items.text: 在默认设置下，我们的场景非常明亮。地板本身是白色的 So with our default settings here, our scene is really bright. The floor itself is clipping white 如果你想象在外面看到这个影子，那么它如此明亮就意味着 and if you imagine seeing this shadow outside, for it to be this bright that would mean the 在我们的场景中，必须要有阳光。因此，您需要在每一个 sunlight would have to be blasting in our scene. So something you'll need to add into every one of 您的项目是一个后期处理卷。因此，我们只需将其拖入场景，并确保 your projects is a post process volume. So we can just drag this into our scene and let's make sure 我们将其保留在照明级别中。这个后期处理卷将是渲染设置 we keep this in our lighting level. And this post process volume is going to be the render settings 在我们的场景中。因此，你每次要做的第一件事就是输入 infinite for inside of our scene. So the first thing you want to do every single time is type in infinite for 无限大。默认的设置方式是，你只能看到当你的 infinite extent. The way this is set up by default is that you'll only see what's happening when your 摄像机就在这个卷中，但我们希望有一个演员来控制整个场景 camera is inside of this volume, but we want to have one actor that controls the entire scene 无论摄像头在哪里。因此，我们要检查这一点，将其设置为 "true"。 regardless of where our camera is. So we're going to check this so that it's set to true. 它有不同的设置，如调色设置、景深、镜头耀斑等、 And this has different settings like color grading settings, depth of field, lens flares, 但通常首先要调整的是曝光设置。默认情况下 but the first thing you'll typically want to adjust is the exposure settings. So by default, 我们的相机设置为自动曝光，而我喜欢把视口当作真正的相机来处理。因此 our camera is set to have auto exposure and I like to treat our viewport like it's a real camera. So 我喜欢将其设置为手动，我们的默认设置会让画面变得非常暗。 I like to set this to manual and our default settings are going to make this go very dark 一开始。我喜欢有几个神奇的数字，就是一些恒定的数字，让你 at first. And I like to have a couple of magic numbers, just some constant numbers that you 在启动场景时应回到典型值。因此，如果要记住一个神奇的数字 should go back to typically when starting up your scene. So if there's one magic number to remember 在曝光补偿方面，我们希望将其默认设置为 10。真正的 in terms of exposure compensation, we'll want to set this to 10 by default. Something really 这里需要注意的是，如果你进入我们的视图模式并一直转到底部、 important to note here, if you go into our view modes and go all the way to the bottom, 你会看到这里有曝光设置，你要确保游戏设置为 you'll see we have this exposure setting here and you want to make sure your game setting is set to true。这将确保我们的后期处理音量就是我们在场景中看到的音量。 true. This will make sure that our post-process volume is what we're seeing inside of our scene. 如果取消选中此项，我就可以更改 EV100 设置来补偿亮度或暗度、 If I uncheck this, I can change this EV100 setting to compensate brighter or darker, 它可以帮助我们即时调整曝光，而不会改变整体设置。但您会 which can help us adjust the exposure on the fly and not change our overall settings. But you'll 要将其设回零，并确保您将游戏设置设为 true，以便我们知道 want to set this back to zero and make sure you have game settings set to true so that we know 我们的场景应该是什么样的。为了让我们对场景有一个准确的了解，这个 exactly what our scene should look like. And just so we get an accurate view of our scene, this 基本形状材料设置为纯白色，而雪实际上并没有这么亮。因此，如果您 basic shape material is set to a pure white and snow actually isn't even this bright. So if you 在这里输入并搜索 "世界"，就会出现一些默认的世界网格材料，我们可以 type in here and just search for world, there'll be some default world grid materials that we can 设置为，这将确保我们的反弹光线更准确、更真实。 set this to, which will make sure our bounce light is a bit more accurate and true to real life.
